description_long: This object is a single-stemmed rose plant with a vibrant pink bloom, set in a small, ornate blue-and-white ceramic vase. The rose features several green leaves, some of which show natural curling and slight discoloration, adding to its realism. The vase is bulbous at the base, narrowing at the neck, and is decorated with intricate blue floral and wave motifs typical of traditional ceramic pottery. The plant stem is slender and slightly curved, with the flower head standing upright and prominent. The overall appearance suggests a decorative piece, likely intended for display in a refined or domestic setting. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A pink rose with green leaves in a blue-and-white decorated ceramic vase, featuring ornate floral patterns. The plant is realistic and suited for decorative display.
description_view_0: The rose bloom and most leaves are visible, with the vase's blue floral motifs clearly shown.
description_view_1: The rose faces forward, and a large leaf juts out to the right, revealing the vase's handle and more of its decorative pattern.
description_view_2: The rose is angled to the left, with the back of the vase and a single leaf most prominent.
description_view_3: The rear of the rose and vase are visible, showing the handle and the back side of the leaf arrangement.
